scope: Reproducible initial census of direct decision-VOI/VOP software and adjacent decision-analysis, experimental-design, active-learning, web, and commercial capabilities. Absence from search results is not proof that no software exists.

searches.query: value of information; EVPI; EVPPI; EVSI; expected net benefit of sampling
searches.notes: Verified package pages, manuals, vignettes, source links and task-view leads.

searches.query: voi, BCEA, dampack, decisionSupport, heemod, hesim
value of information; EVPI; EVPPI; EVSI; value of perspective
searches.notes: Registry search is noisy; candidates require source/documentation confirmation.

searches.query: value of information; EVPI; EVPPI; EVSI
searches.notes: No independently verified direct VOI crate was identified in this snapshot.

searches.query: value of information; Bayesian optimal experimental design
searches.notes: Kirstine is related Bayesian design software; no direct decision-VOI package was verified.

searches.query: value of information; EVPI; Bayesian experimental design
searches.notes: No direct external Mojo VOI package was verified.

searches.query: "value of information" language:R OR language:Python OR language:Julia OR language:Rust
value of information EVPI EVPPI EVSI
searches.notes: No additional direct package was independently verified.

searches.query: web-based value-of-information tools SAVI BCEAweb RANE VICTOR
TreeAge Analytica value of information EVPI EVPPI
searches.notes: Only publicly documented behavior is eligible for mapping; internal algorithms remain unverified.

searches.query: expected information gain BALD BatchBALD knowledge gradient Pyro BoTorch
ISPOR value of information analytical methods software

features.label: EVPI, multiparameter EVPPI, EVSI and ENBS
features.voiage_evidence: voiage/methods/basic.py; voiage/methods/sample_information.py

features.label: GAM, GP, earth, BART and INLA EVPPI estimators
features.voiage_evidence: GAM/random-forest/BART-style metamodel surfaces exist, but estimator-by-estimator equivalence is not yet demonstrated.

features.label: Regression, moment-matching and importance-sampling EVSI
features.voiage_evidence: Regression and moment-based estimators exist; importance-sampling equivalence remains planned.

features.label: Tidy results and VOI plotting
features.voiage_evidence: VOI curves exist; tidy result and expected-loss projection require conformance evidence.

features.label: Net benefit, optimal strategy, CEAC, CEAF and expected loss
features.voiage_evidence: Net benefit, CEAC and CEAF exist; expected-loss calculations, BCEA-wide reporting and shared result semantics remain gaps.

features.label: EVPI and single-parameter EVPPI surfaces
features.voiage_evidence: voiage/methods/basic.py

features.label: Base, ggplot2 and plotly economic-evaluation plots
features.voiage_evidence: Static Python plots exist; interactive reporting is not yet equivalent.

features.label: EVPI, EVPPI and Gaussian-approximation EVSI
features.voiage_evidence: Estimands exist; dampack Gaussian-approximation equivalence needs fixtures.

features.label: PSA, CEAC, CEAF, dominance and sensitivity workflows
features.voiage_evidence: CEAC, CEAF and dominance exist; full sensitivity workflow remains incomplete.

features.label: Model-integrated PSA and EVPI
features.voiage_evidence: Independent EVPI exists; optional import normalization exists and requires expanded fixtures.

features.label: State-transition modeling, heterogeneity and budget impact
features.voiage_evidence: General model construction is delegated; posterior/model outputs remain accepted inputs.
features.notes: VOIAGE should not duplicate a general health-economic simulation engine.

features.label: Subgroup CEA, CEAF, EVPI, NMB, ICER and CE-plane outputs
features.voiage_evidence: Individual calculations exist; integrated subgroup result parity is not yet demonstrated.

features.label: Empirical single- and multi-variable EVPI with plots
features.voiage_evidence: EVPI/EVPPI exist; welfare-decision input and plotting parity require fixtures.

tools.name: Sheffield Accelerated Value of Information
tools.license: BSD-3-Clause source; hosted service terms separate

features.label: CSV PSA import, CE plane, CEAC, population EVPI and grouped EVPPI
features.voiage_evidence: Core analysis exists; population scaling, CSV migration and grouped regression fixtures are incomplete.

features.label: Payer strategy-specific and uncertainty burdens
features.voiage_evidence: No named payer-burden result contract yet.

features.label: CSV outputs and PDF, HTML or Word summary report
features.voiage_evidence: Reporting exists but not equivalent multi-format output.

tools.name: BCEAweb
tools.limitations: Current hosted behavior and version were not independently reproduced.

features.label: Web economic evaluation and BCEA VOI workflow
features.voiage_evidence: Only literature-described behavior is recorded.

tools.name: Rapid Assessment of Need for Evidence

features.label: Rapid minimal-model research-need assessment
features.voiage_evidence: Literature triage only; current service behavior was not verified.

features.label: Cardiovascular and comparative-research trial VOI
features.voiage_evidence: Literature triage only; current service behavior was not verified.

features.label: Nested Monte Carlo, variational, Laplace and posterior expected-information-gain estimators
features.voiage_evidence: Backend-neutral EIG contract and CPU reference remain planned; Pyro will be optional.
features.notes: EIG is not labeled economic VOI without an explicit decision and utility.

features.label: Batch knowledge gradient
features.voiage_evidence: Backend-neutral value-of-computation/acquisition contract remains planned.

features.label: BALD and BatchBALD active learning
features.voiage_evidence: No stable BALD estimator yet; BoTorch remains optional.

features.label: Predictive entropy search and preference acquisition
features.voiage_evidence: Contracts and deterministic fixtures remain planned.

features.label: Pool, stream and multi-annotator query strategies
features.voiage_evidence: VOIAGE will value information actions, not duplicate a general active-learning toolkit.

features.label: Bayesian optimization, experimental design and multi-fidelity workflows
features.voiage_evidence: Decision-value contracts are planned; generic model fitting remains delegated.

features.label: Directional perspective discordance, equity and perspective-sensitive CEA
features.voiage_evidence: Current perspective module covers a subset; C01/C02 conformance remains the controlling contract.

features.label: Cybersecurity Monte Carlo EVPI and ROI selection
features.voiage_evidence: Domain-neutral EVPI and utility inputs support the same class of decision; a security worked example is still desirable.

features.label: Expected value of ecological survey schemes with imperfect detection
features.voiage_evidence: The generic DecisionProblemV2 can represent surveys, detection error and acquisition cost, but no conservation-survey estimator or fixture is implemented.

features.label: Budget-constrained exact, approximate and heuristic survey-scheme optimization
features.voiage_evidence: Portfolio VOI exists experimentally, but spatial survey design, detection models and exact-versus-heuristic conformance remain unimplemented.

features.label: Expected value of perfect information for external validation from net-benefit moments
features.voiage_evidence: Validation VOI exists experimentally, but the bivariate-normal moment estimator and an independent prediction-model fixture remain unimplemented.

features.label: Global and cluster-specific EVPI and partial information for heterogeneous validation settings
features.voiage_evidence: VOIAGE has component estimands, but it lacks the global-versus-local cluster contract, prevalence EVPPI and trivariate meta-analytic fixture.

features.label: General Gaussian-approximation EVPPI and EVSI workflow
features.voiage_evidence: Regression estimators exist, but the published Gaussian-approximation algorithm and independent reference fixture have not been reproduced.

features.label: Meta-analysis EVPI, EVPPI, EVSI, optimal trial size and GRADE bridge
features.voiage_evidence: The component methods exist or are planned, but the tool's posterior, heterogeneity, optimal-sample and certainty-mapping behavior lacks independent reproduction.

tools.name: NREL geothermal Value of Information app

features.label: Perfect and imperfect information for geothermal drill-or-walk-away decisions
features.voiage_evidence: Generic EVPI and EVSI are available, but the imperfect geophysical-signal likelihood workflow and public domain fixture are not yet reproduced.

features.label: EVPI, EVPPI and EVSI analysis
features.voiage_evidence: Canonical estimands exist, but this package's estimator behavior has not yet been independently reproduced.

features.label: CEA, DCEA, budget impact, MCDA, PSA, subgroup and implementation workflows
features.voiage_evidence: VOIAGE covers the decision-value components but does not claim parity with general model authoring, budget impact, or MCDA without fixtures.

tools.name: Kirstine.jl
tools.license: License file requires manual SPDX confirmation

features.label: Bayesian optimal design for nonlinear regression models
features.voiage_evidence: General design optimization is adjacent; VOIAGE needs decision-utility linkage and Julia conformance.

tools.name: Analytica
tools.limitations: Parity is limited to observable, publicly specified decision-analysis behavior.

features.label: Influence-diagram decision modeling and publicly documented value-of-information analysis
features.voiage_evidence: Core estimands exist, but proprietary workflow and numerical details are not reproducible.

tools.name: TreeAge Pro
tools.limitations: Model-authoring parity is out of scope; only public VOI/CEA behavior can be assessed.

features.label: Decision trees, state-transition models, PSA and VOI workflows
features.voiage_evidence: VOIAGE consumes decision outputs and does not imitate the proprietary model editor.

features.label: Rust-authoritative stable decision-VOI kernels
features.voiage_evidence: rust/crates/voiage-numerics and shared fixtures

tools.name: voiage Mojo binding
tools.registry: no external Mojo registry publication claimed

features.label: C-ABI and CLI/JSON fallback surface
features.voiage_evidence: bindings/mojo; expansion beyond EVPI is tracked by #320.
